title: Looking for ongoing development support - Hospitality & Training
excerpt: Located in Australia, some experience managing Monday. Just want to set it up correctly the first time round. Multiple boards required, would like to just start with one at a time to see if it a suitable fit. Looking to …

posts.author: Ricksgarage (Ben Jamieson)
posts.cookedHtml: Located in Australia, some experience managing Monday. Just want to set it up correctly the first time round. Multiple boards required, would like to just start with one at a time to see if it a suitable fit. Looking to send weekly wastage reports.

posts.author: Alex.Robinson (Alex Robinson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Ricksgarage,

Welcome to the community.
Id love to be able to assist you with monday.com and helping you build your workflow and reports.
Feel free to book a session with me here so we can understand further your requirements.

Look forward to hearing from you.
Thanks
Alex Robinson
upstream

posts.author: Chad_Nantz (Chad Nantz)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Ricksgarage

Would love to help you get started, feel free to message me at chadnantz@coachingmonday.com

Regards

posts.author: Andrew1 (Andrew)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Rick,
If you are still looking out for some help, feel free to reach out to me as this is well within my area of expertise.
You can reach me on andrewjohnson56782@gmail.com
Best Wishes,
Andrew
